scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @kitten/engine typecheck && bun run --filter @kitten/desktop typecheck && bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten typecheck
scripts.test: bun run --filter @kitten/engine test && bun run --filter @kitten/desktop test && bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten test
scripts.test:coverage: bun run --filter @kitten/engine test:coverage && bun run --filter @kitten/desktop test:coverage && bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten test:coverage
scripts.verify:cockpit: bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten typecheck && bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten test && bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten selfcheck && bun run --filter @matheusbbarni/kitten build
